allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ }; if \($found\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $found"; & $found[0] --version } else { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED"; winget --version })
